16: 
17: package workloadmanager
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"fmt"
22: 	"net/http"
23: 	"os"
24: 	"os/signal"
25: 	"sync"
26: 	"syscall"
27: 	"time"
28: 
29: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
30: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
31: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c"
32: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
33: 
34: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
35: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
36: )
37: 
38: // ServerConfig holds server configuration
39: type ServerConfig struct {
40: 	Port       int
41: 	EnableTLS  bool
42: 	TLSCert    string
43: 	TLSKey     string
44: 	EnableAuth bool
45: }
46: 
47: // Server is the workload manager HTTP server
48: type Server struct {
49: 	config     ServerConfig
50: 	engine     *gin.Engine
51: 	httpServer *http.Server
52: 	k8sClient  *K8sClient
53: 	informers  *Informers
54: 	tokenCache *TokenCache
55: 	store      store.Store
56: 	wg         sync.WaitGroup
57: 	ctx        context.Context
58: 	cancel     context.CancelFunc
59: }
60: 
61: // NewServer creates a new workload manager server
62: func NewServer(config ServerConfig) (*Server, error) {
63: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
64: 
65: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
66: 	engine := gin.New()
67: 	engine.Use(gin.Logger())
68: 	engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
69: 
70: 	server := &Server{
71: 		config: config,
72: 		engine: engine,
73: 		ctx:    ctx,
74: 		cancel: cancel,
75: 		store:  store.Storage(),
76: 	}
77: 
78: 	return server, nil
79: }
80: 
81: // Start starts the server
82: func (s *Server) Start() error {
83: 	// Ping store before starting
84: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(s.ctx, 5*time.Second)
85: 	defer cancel()
86: 	if err := s.store.Ping(ctx); err != nil {
87: 		return fmt.Errorf("store ping failed: %w", err)
88: 	}
89: 	klog.Info("Store ping successful")
90: 
91: 	// Initialize Kubernetes client
92: 	k8sClient, err := NewK8sClient(s.config.EnableAuth)
93: 	if err != nil {
94: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create k8s client: %w", err)
95: 	}
96: 	s.k8sClient = k8sClient
97: 
98: 	// Initialize informers
99: 	informers, err := NewInformers(k8sClient.GetConfig())
100: 	if err != nil {
101: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create informers: %w", err)
102: 	}
103: 	s.informers = informers
104: 
105: 	// Wait for informers to sync
106: 	ctxSync, cancelSync := context.WithTimeout(s.ctx, time.Minute)
107: 	defer cancelSync()
108: 	if err := informers.WaitForSync(ctxSync); err != nil {
109: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to sync informers: %w", err)
110: 	}
111: 	klog.Info("Informers synced")
112: 
113: 	// Initialize token cache
114: 	s.tokenCache = NewTokenCache(1000, 5*time.Minute)
115: 
116: 	// Setup routes
117: 	s.setupRoutes()
118: 
119: 	// Start garbage collector
120: 	s.wg.Add(1)
121: 	go s.runGarbageCollector()
122: 
123: 	// Setup HTTP server with h2c
124: 	h2s := &http2.Server{}
125: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
126: 		Addr:        fmt.Sprintf(":%d", s.config.Port),
127: 		Handler:     h2c.NewHandler(s.engine, h2s),
128: 		ReadTimeout: 15 * time.Second,
129: 		IdleTimeout: 90 * time.Second,
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	// Handle shutdown gracefully
133: 	quit := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
134: 	signal.Notify(quit, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)
135: 
136: 	// Start server in goroutine
137: 	go func() {
138: 		klog.Infof("Starting workload manager server on :%d", s.config.Port)
139: 		var err error
140: 		if s.config.EnableTLS {
141: 			if s.config.TLSCert == "" || s.config.TLSKey == "" {
142: 				klog.Fatal("TLS enabled but cert/key not provided")
143: 				return
144: 			}
145: 			err = s.httpServer.ListenAndServeTLS(s.config.TLSCert, s.config.TLSKey)
146: 		} else {
147: 			err = s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
148: 		}
149: 		if err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
150: 			klog.Errorf("Server error: %v", err)
151: 		}
152: 	}()
153: 
154: 	// Wait for shutdown signal
155: 	<-quit
156: 	klog.Info("Shutting down server...")
157: 
158: 	// Shutdown with timeout
159: 	shutdownCtx, shutdownCancel := context.WithTimeout(s.ctx, 15*time.Second)
160: 	defer shutdownCancel()
161: 
162: 	s.cancel()
163: 
164: 	if err := s.httpServer.Shutdown(shutdownCtx); err != nil {
165: 		klog.Errorf("Server shutdown error: %v", err)
166: 	}
167: 
168: 	// Wait for background workers
169: 	s.wg.Wait()
170: 
171: 	// Close store
172: 	s.store.Close()
173: 
174: 	klog.Info("Server stopped")
175: 	return nil
176: }
177: 
178: // setupRoutes configures HTTP routes
179: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
180: 	// Health endpoint (no auth)
181: 	s.engine.GET("/health", s.handleHealth)
182: 
183: 	// API v1 group
184: 	v1 := s.engine.Group("/v1")
185: 	v1.Use(s.loggingMiddleware())
186: 	if s.config.EnableAuth {
187: 		v1.Use(s.authMiddleware())
188: 	}
189: 
190: 	// AgentRuntime routes
191: 	v1.POST("/agent-runtime", s.handleCreateAgentRuntime)
192: 	v1.DELETE("/agent-runtime/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteAgentRuntime)
193: 
194: 	// CodeInterpreter routes
195: 	v1.POST("/code-interpreter", s.handleCreateCodeInterpreter)
196: 	v1.DELETE("/code-interpreter/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteCodeInterpreter)
197: }
198: 
199: // handleHealth handles health checks
200: func (s *Server) handleHealth(c *gin.Context) {
201: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "healthy"})
202: }
203: 
204: // loggingMiddleware returns a logging middleware
205: func (s *Server) loggingMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
206: 	return gin.LoggerWithConfig(gin.LoggerConfig{
207: 		Output: os.Stdout,
208: 		Formatter: func(param gin.LogFormatterParams) string {
209: 			return fmt.Sprintf("%s - [%s] \"%s %s %s %d %s \"%s\" %s\"\n",
210: 				param.ClientIP,
211: 				param.TimeStamp.Format(time.RFC1123),
212: 				param.Method,
213: 				param.Path,
214: 				param.Request.Proto,
215: 				param.StatusCode,
216: 				param.Latency,
217: 				param.Request.UserAgent(),
218: 				param.ErrorMessage,
219: 			)
220: 		},
221: 	})
222: }
223: 
224: // runGarbageCollector runs the garbage collection loop
225: func (s *Server) runGarbageCollector() {
226: 	defer s.wg.Done()
227: 
228: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(types.GCTickInterval)
229: 	defer ticker.Stop()
230: 
231: 	for {
232: 		select {
233: 		case <-s.ctx.Done():
234: 			return
235: 		case <-ticker.C:
236: 			s.gcTick()
237: 		}
238: 	}
239: }
240: 
241: // gcTick performs one garbage collection tick
242: func (s *Server) gcTick() {
243: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(s.ctx, types.GCContextTimeout)
244: 	defer cancel()
245: 
246: 	now := time.Now()
247: 
248: 	// Query inactive sandboxes (idle timeout)
249: 	inactiveCutoff := now.Add(-types.DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout)
250: 	inactiveSandboxes, err := s.store.ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, inactiveCutoff, 16)
251: 	if err != nil {
252: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to list inactive sandboxes: %v", err)
253: 	}
254: 
255: 	// Query expired sandboxes
256: 	expiredSandboxes, err := s.store.ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, now, 16)
257: 	if err != nil {
258: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to list expired sandboxes: %v", err)
259: 	}
260: 
261: 	// Merge and deduplicate
262: 	sessionIDs := make(map[string]*types.SandboxInfo)
263: 	for _, sb := range inactiveSandboxes {
264: 		sessionIDs[sb.SessionID] = sb
265: 	}
266: 	for _, sb := range expiredSandboxes {
267: 		sessionIDs[sb.SessionID] = sb
268: 	}
269: 
270: 	// Delete each unique sandbox
271: 	for sessionID, sandbox := range sessionIDs {
272: 		s.deleteSandbox(ctx, sessionID, sandbox.Kind)
273: 	}
274: }
275: 
276: // deleteSandbox deletes a sandbox and removes from store
277: func (s *Server) deleteSandbox(ctx context.Context, sessionID, kind string) {
278: 	klog.Infof("Deleting sandbox: sessionID=%s, kind=%s", sessionID, kind)
279: 
280: 	// Delete from K8s
281: 	if err := s.k8sClient.DeleteSandbox(ctx, sessionID, kind); err != nil {
282: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", sessionID, err)
283: 		return
284: 	}
285: 
286: 	// Delete from store
287: 	if err := s.store.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID); err != nil {
288: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to delete session %s from store: %v", sessionID, err)
289: 	}
290: }

(End of file - total 290 lines)

78: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
79: 	if err != nil {
80: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to parse last-activity-time for sandbox %s/%s: %v",
81: 			req.Namespace, req.Name, err)
82: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
83: 	}
84: 
85: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
86: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
87: 		klog.Infof("Sandbox %s/%s has expired (last activity: %s), deleting",
88: 			req.Namespace, req.Name, lastActivity.Format(time.RFC3339))
89: 
90: 		if err := r.client.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
91: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
92: 				return reconcile.Result{}, nil
93: 			}
94: 			return reconcile.Result{}, fmt.Errorf("failed to delete sandbox: %w", err)
95: 		}
96: 
97: 		klog.Infof("Successfully deleted expired sandbox %s/%s", req.Namespace, req.Name)
98: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
99: 	}
100: 
101: 	requeueAfter := time.Until(expirationTime)
102: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s/%s not yet expired, requeueing in %v",
103: 		req.Namespace, req.Name, requeueAfter)
104: 
105: 	return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueAfter}, nil
